arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Scamacca expected back ahead of schedule
arts.sum: Atalanta’s striker Gianluca Scamacca is making faster progress than anticipated in his recovery from an anterior cruciate ligament tear. The Roman forward, who underwent surgery on August 5th performed by Professor Mariani, is currently completing the initial phase of his rehabilitation at Villa Stuart. There’s now a new timeline for his return to the pitch. Initially, the recovery period was estimated to be around 6-7 months following his injury. However, contrary to these earlier projections, Scamacca’s return could come sooner than expected. arts.ttl: “One of my favourite players” – Ian Wright lavishes praise on Arsenal-linked star
arts.sum: Ian Wright has lavished praise upon Nottingham Forest defender Murillo, labelling him as ‘one of his favourite players to watch’ right now. The Brazilian arrived at the City Ground last summer from Corinthians and played 36 times across all competitions — including 32 Premier League outings. arts.ttl: Former Arsenal striker arrested and charged in £600,000 UK drugs plot
arts.sum: The 33-year-old, who currently plays for Scottish Championship side Greenock Morton, was arrested on Wednesday by the National Crime Agency. Emmanuel-Thomas' best stint arguably came after leaving the Tractor Boys when he joined Bristol City.
